subject: fix(pwa): split combined 'any maskable' icon into separate entries
body:
'any maskable' combined in a single icon entry causes browsers to pick
the wrong variant. Split into explicit purpose: 'any' (192 + 512) and
purpose: 'maskable' (512). Reuses 512x512 for maskable until a
dedicated 1024x1024 is generated (tracked in TODO.md).

Tags: pwa, a11y, infrastructure
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
